utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property; financing; legal_services; moving_services; setup_services; total_budget. The final solution includes all 6 sections. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) property: includes selected property with details (name, address, price, beds/baths, type, description) and price—fully specified. 2) financing: includes a financing solution and terms; it provides type (First-Time Buyer Mortgage), down payment estimate, arrangement fee, and government incentives. It lacks detailed mortgage terms like interest rate, amortization, and payment schedule, but the format only requires 'financing solution with terms'—the provided terms (down payment, fees, incentives) qualify as terms, albeit high-level. 3) legal_services: includes services with costs—premium package, disbursements range, total estimated: fully specified. 4) moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs—selected option and estimated cost: fully specified. 5) setup_services: utility and setup services—provides initial setup cost and monthly ranges for utilities and insurance: fully specified. 6) total_budget: complete cost breakdown—provides property price, down payment, and an itemized initial setup and service costs with a total; while it does not include land transfer tax or mortgage insurance, the format only asks for a complete cost breakdown of the package presented; within its scope, it is itemized and totals initial setup. Therefore, all 6 items appear and are sufficiently specified per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes the purchase property 'Historic Townhouse', the financing option 'First-Time Buyer Mortgage', legal service 'Premium Legal Package', survey 'Full Structural Survey' (listed as property_survey), moving service 'Standard Moving', and utility setup 'Premium Utilities'. Each of these items has a corresponding rating in the ground-truth data. I matched each named item to its exact counterpart in the ground-truth and extracted the rating numbers.
